'''Nomlis III''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Kurdin system]] where the [[Bretie Facility]], a production center for the [[TIE Experimental Project]], orbited. Nothing else is known about the planet, other than the fact that it was the site of the battle in which [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] pilots, one of them being [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]], raided and [[Battle of Nomlis III|destroyed]] the Bretie Facility in their quest to disrupt the TIE Experimental Project being carried out by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].
